notes: BG 6.32's engineering analog is anchored on atma-aupamyena — by-analogy-with-self — which is verse-specific. Other equanimity verses (2.55-2.72, 5.18-5.20) anchor on different terms (sthita-prajna, sama-darsana). The engineering claim 'senior reads junior by analogy with own remembered experience' is not transferable to those verses without the analogy-with-self anchor. PASS.
